hooks.command: bash -c 'PROMPT="$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT"; SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); CODING_RX="\\b(implement|code|coder|build|builds?|fix|fixes?|add|adds?|create|creates?|debug|debugs?|deploy|deploys?|refactor|refactors?|write|writes?|ecris?|corriges?|ajoutes?|cr[ée]es?|implemente|impl[ée]mente|contract|contrat|solidity|vyper|token|ERC-?[0-9]|dApp|smart ?contract)\\b"; WEB3_RX="\\b(solidity|vyper|cairo|foundry|hardhat|anchor|smart ?contract|ERC-?(20|721|1155|4626)|dApp|onchain|on-chain|reentrancy|uniswap|EVM)\\b"; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qEi "$CODING_RX"; then echo "<genius_reminder>"; echo "⚠️ GT LEAD INVARIANTS (this prompt looks like a coding task)"; echo ""; echo "1. NEVER code directly. You are the Lead. Route every change through a Genius Team skill."; echo "2. Check .genius/state.json BEFORE any action (current skill/phase/checkpoint)."; echo "3. Pick the RIGHT skill for the task type:"; echo "   - smart contracts / Solidity / Vyper / Foundry / Hardhat / Anchor → genius-dev-web3"; echo "   - React/Vue/CSS/UI → genius-dev-frontend"; echo "   - API/server/auth/middleware → genius-dev-backend"; echo "   - SQL/schema/migrations → genius-dev-database"; echo "   - React Native/Expo → genius-dev-mobile"; echo "   - Third-party SDK wrapper → genius-dev-api"; echo "   - Token/NFT due diligence (analysis, not dev) → genius-crypto"; echo "   - Full-stack / unclassified → genius-dev (dispatcher)"; echo "4. Current skill in state.json: $SKILL"; if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qEi "$WEB3_RX"; then echo ""; echo "🔗 WEB3/SMART-CONTRACT SIGNAL DETECTED → prefer genius-dev-web3 over genius-dev-backend."; fi; echo "</genius_reminder>"; fi'

bash -c 'if [ ! -f .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md ] || [ $(wc -l < .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -lt 10 ]; then ./scripts/memory-recover.sh 2>/dev/null || true; fi; bash scripts/memory-briefing.sh 2>/dev/null; SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); PHASE=$(jq -r ".phase // \"unknown\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); echo "<genius_session>"; echo "Phase: $PHASE | Skill: $SKILL"; echo ""; if [ -f .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md ]; then echo "<briefing>"; head -40 .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md; echo "</briefing>"; fi; echo ""; if [ -f .claude/plan.md ]; then total=$(grep -c "^- \\[" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); completed=$(grep -c "^- \\[x\\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); next=$(grep -m1 "^- \\[ \\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null | sed "s/^- \\[ \\] //"); echo "Tasks: $completed/$total complete"; if [ -n "$next" ]; then echo "Next: $next"; fi; fi; if [ "$SKILL" != "none" ] && [ "$SKILL" != "null" ]; then echo ""; echo "Resume skill: $SKILL"; fi; echo "</genius_session>"'

bash -c 'TOOL="$TOOL_NAME"; INPUT="$TOOL_INPUT"; SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); TIMESTAMP=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"); echo "[$TIMESTAMP] TOOL=$TOOL SKILL=$SKILL INPUT=${INPUT:0:100}" >> .genius/guard.log 2>/dev/null; if [ "$SKILL" = "none" ] || [ "$SKILL" = "null" ] || [ -z "$SKILL" ]; then if echo "$TOOL" | grep -qE "^(Write|Edit|Bash)$"; then echo "⚠️ GUARD WARNING: Action $TOOL without active skill! Run a skill first."; fi; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT="$TOOL_INPUT"; SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); DEV_SKILLS="genius-dev genius-dev-frontend genius-dev-backend genius-dev-mobile genius-dev-database genius-dev-api genius-dev-web3 genius-debugger genius-refactor genius-fix genius-orchestrator"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE "\\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|py|go|rs|sol|vy|cairo|move|java|kt|swift|rb|php|c|cpp|h|hpp)$"; then if ! echo " $DEV_SKILLS " | grep -qE " $SKILL "; then echo "⚠️ GUARD: Writing code with skill=$SKILL — NOT a dev skill. Invoke the right genius-dev-* sub-skill first (web3/frontend/backend/mobile/database/api)."; fi; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE "\\.(sol|vy|cairo|move)$"; then if [ "$SKILL" != "genius-dev-web3" ] && [ "$SKILL" != "genius-dev" ] && [ "$SKILL" != "genius-orchestrator" ]; then echo "🔗 GUARD: Editing a smart-contract file (.sol/.vy/.cairo/.move) with skill=$SKILL. Use genius-dev-web3."; fi; fi; fi'

bash -c 'SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); PHASE=$(jq -r ".phase // \"unknown\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); CHECKPOINT=$(jq -r ".checkpoint // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); ./scripts/memory-capture.sh conversation "Pre-compaction" "skill:$SKILL phase:$PHASE checkpoint:$CHECKPOINT" 2>/dev/null || true; ./scripts/memory-rollup.sh --force 2>/dev/null || true; echo "<critical_context>"; echo "Skill: $SKILL | Phase: $PHASE | Checkpoint: $CHECKPOINT"; if [ -f .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md ]; then echo ""; head -40 .genius/memory/BRIEFING.md; fi; if [ -f .genius/activity.log ]; then echo ""; echo "Recent files:"; tail -10 .genius/activity.log 2>/dev/null; fi; echo ""; echo "After compaction: resume skill $SKILL from checkpoint $CHECKPOINT."; echo "</critical_context>"'

bash -c 'TIMESTAMP=$(date "+%H:%M:%S"); FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; echo "[$TIMESTAMP] FILE: $FILE" >> .genius/activity.log 2>/dev/null || true; SKILL=$(jq -r ".currentSkill // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(html|xml|md)$"; then ./scripts/memory-capture.sh artifact "$FILE" "Generated by skill:$SKILL" 2>/dev/null || true; else ./scripts/memory-capture.sh action "Modified: $FILE" "skill:$SKILL" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'

bash -c 'CHECKPOINT=$(jq -r ".checkpoint // \"none\"" .genius/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); if [ "$CHECKPOINT" != "none" ] && [ "$CHECKPOINT" != "null" ]; then ./scripts/memory-capture.sh milestone "Session ended" "checkpoint:$CHECKPOINT" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; ./scripts/memory-rollup.sh --days 1 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f .claude/plan.md ] && [ -f .genius/state.json ]; then total=$(grep -c "^- \\[" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); completed=$(grep -c "^- \\[x\\]" .claude/plan.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); jq --arg t "$total" --arg c "$completed" --arg now "$(date -Iseconds 2>/dev/null || date)" ".tasks.total = ($t | tonumber) | .tasks.completed = ($c | tonumber) | .updated_at = \"$now\"" .genius/state.json > .genius/state.json.tmp && mv .genius/state.json.tmp .genius/state.json; fi 2>/dev/null || true'
